name: k8v
description: Flow-based modeling software with infinite canvas and graph-based data flow

scripts.dev: npm run build:domain && concurrently --names backend,frontend --prefix "[{name}]" --restart-tries 10 --restart-after 1000 --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build:domain && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:mcp
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd packages/backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:unit: npm run build:domain && tsx --test packages/backend/tests/*.test.ts packages/frontend/tests/*.test.ts packages/mcp-server/tests/*.test.ts
